sentences.arabic: أَجْرَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ تَمْرِينًا لِمُحَاكَاةِ الزَّلَازِلِ لِتَدْرِيبِ السُّكَّانِ عَلَى كَيْفِيَّةِ التَّصَرُّفِ فِي حَالَاتِ الطَّوَارِئِ.
sentences.translation: Grad je proveo vježbu simulacije zemljotresa kako bi obučio stanovnike kako da se ponašaju u vanrednim situacijama.
sentences.translationEn: The city conducted an earthquake simulation drill to train residents on how to act in emergencies.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ فِي التَّمْرِينِ رِجَالُ الْإِطْفَاءِ وَالشُّرْطَةُ وَفِرَقُ الْإِسْعَافِ.
sentences.translation: U vježbi su učestvovali vatrogasci, policija i ekipe hitne pomoći.
sentences.translationEn: Firefighters, police and ambulance teams took part in the drill.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الْمَوَاطِنُونَ كَيْفَ يَحْمُونَ أَنْفُسَهُمْ وَيُخَلِّصُونَ الْمَحَاصِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Građani su naučili kako da se zaštite i oslobode zarobljenih.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens learned how to protect themselves and rescue those trapped.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَئِيسُ الدِّفَاعِ الْمَدَنِيِّ إِنَّ هَذَا التَّدْرِيبَ يُنْقِذُ الْأَرْوَاحَ حِينَ تَقَعُ الْكَوَارِثُ الْحَقِيقِيَّةُ.
sentences.translation: Šef civilne zaštite rekao je da ova obuka spašava živote kada dođe do stvarnih katastrofa.
sentences.translationEn: The head of civil defence said this training saves lives when real disasters strike.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَزِمُ الْحُكُومَةُ تَنْظِيمَ هَذَا التَّمْرِينِ مَرَّةً كُلَّ عَامٍ فِي جَمِيعِ الْمُدُنِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada namjerava organizovati ovu vježbu jednom godišnje u svim gradovima.
sentences.translationEn: The government intends to organise this drill once a year in all cities.
